decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with quick and aggressive plays while maintaining control over the board. Utilizing a combination of cheap spells and creatures with evasion, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with bounce spells and removal. By combining card draw and tempo plays, the deck seeks to outpace the opponent and close out the game before they have a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize powerful combo cards to quickly reanimate creatures from the graveyard, allowing for strong and unexpected plays. It also includes disruption cards like Duress to control the opponent's hand, as well as card draw and mana ramp to help achieve the combo. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of powerful creatures and control elements, ultimately leading to victory through a well-executed game plan. Additionally, the inclusion of land cards like Watery Grave and Cavern of Souls helps to support the strategy and ensure smooth mana production.

The strategy of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence with efficient creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, while disrupting your opponent's game plan with bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Bounce Off. Sleight of Hand and Stock Up help you dig for key cards, while Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent provide reach and removal. Multiversal Passage and Riverpyre Verge allow for consistent mana fixing, and Wild Ride can provide a surprise finisher. Overall, this deck aims to apply relentless pressure and control the tempo of the game to secure a quick victory.

This Azorius Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with efficient creatures like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies, while using cards like Springleaf Drum and Multiversal Passage to ramp up mana. Quantum Riddler provides card advantage, while Seam Rip and Parting Gust help control the opponent's board. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with flying creatures and tempo plays, utilizing Haliya, Guided by Light and Starfield Shepherd for additional value. Abandoned Air Temple and Floodfarm Verge provide additional mana fixing to ensure a smooth mana curve throughout the game.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying evasive flying creatures and using combat tricks to push through damage. By utilizing cards like Momo, Friendly Flier, Sage of the Skies, and Haliya, Guided by Light, the deck aims to build a wide board presence that is difficult for opponents to block effectively. Multiversal Passage and Cosmogrand Zenith provide additional flexibility and evasion, while cards like Seam Rip and Parting Gust help clear the way for attacks. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a relentless assault of flying creatures and efficient combat interactions.

This Simic Aggro deck focuses on building a strong board presence quickly by utilizing mana ramp cards like Llanowar Elves and Gene Pollinator to get out threats such as Badgermole Cub and Quantum Riddler. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Seam Rip to control the board and protect your creatures. With a mix of efficient creatures and powerful spells, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its aggressive strategy and finish them off with a big finisher like Craterhoof Behemoth or Brightglass Gearhulk.

The deck focuses on aggressive gameplay through a combination of efficient creatures and burn spells. It aims to quickly develop a board presence with creatures like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies, while using cards like Burst Lightning and Parting Gust to deal direct damage or remove threats. The deck also includes cards like Ashling, Rekindled and Nova Hellkite for additional power and reach. The mana base is centered around land cards that can produce multiple colors of mana to support the deck's versatile spellcasting.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of countering spells, drawing cards, and removing threats on the board. With cards like Sleight of Hand and Opt to dig for answers, along with counterspells like Spell Pierce and Spell Snare, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide additional control elements by tapping down creatures or dealing direct damage. Burst Lightning and Winternight Stories offer removal options, while Abandon Attachments and Bounce Off can deal with problematic permanents.

The main concept of this deck is to focus on aggressive play using a combination of creatures with evasion abilities like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, along with cheap, efficient spells like Burst Lightning and Stock Up. The deck includes bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Eddymurk Crab to disrupt the opponent's board and tempo. The deck also includes card draw and scry effects to maintain card advantage and ensure consistency. The mana base is optimized for a balance of Islands and dual lands to support the deck's aggressive game plan.

This deck focuses on using aggressive creatures with disruptive abilities to control the board while quickly attacking the opponent's life total. By combining powerful creatures like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Gloomlake Verge with control elements like Spyglass Siren and Floodpits Drowner, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver opponents. Cards like Shoot the Sheriff and Requiting Hex provide additional removal and disruption, while Tishana's Tidebinder and Deep-Cavern Bat offer further threats. The deck's mana base allows for consistent casting of spells and creatures, ensuring a steady stream of pressure on the opponent.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw. Cards like Opt, Winternight Stories, and Sleight of Hand help to filter through the deck and find key pieces. Eddymurk Crab and Riverpyre Verge provide additional control elements, while Burst Lightning and Hearth Elemental offer removal options. Spells like Abandon Attachments and Spell Snare help to disrupt the opponent's game plan. With a mix of control elements and card advantage, this deck aims to outlast the opponent and secure a victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing various reanimation spells and powerful creatures to create devastating combo plays. By using cards like Requiting Hex and Awaken the Honored Dead, the player can fill their graveyard with creatures to later bring back with cards like Superior Spider-Man and Overlord of the Balemurk. The deck also includes disruption with cards like Deceit and Bitter Triumph to control the board and protect the combo pieces. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board presence and tricky plays.

The main idea of the deck is to quickly build a board presence and apply pressure to the opponent through efficient creatures and spells. Using cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand to dig for key pieces, the deck aims to play threats like Drake Hatcher and Callous Sell-Sword early on to start attacking. Cards like Turn Inside Out and Wild Ride can provide additional burst damage, while Slickshot Show-Off and Elusive Otter offer ways to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck focuses on aggression and tempo to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

The deck focuses on quickly playing low-cost aggressive creatures to overwhelm the opponent and deal damage quickly. It utilizes cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer to buff creatures and increase their attacking power. Cards like Sazh's Chocobo and Badgermole Cub provide additional aggression, while Escape Tunnel and Meltstrider's Resolve help protect creatures or give them evasion. Overall, the goal of the deck is to establish board presence early and push through damage efficiently to defeat the opponent before they can stabilize.

The main strategy of this deck revolves around playing low-cost creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent with damage. By utilizing cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Stormchaser's Talent to deal damage, combined with bounce spells like Bounce Off and Boomerang Basics for disruption, the deck aims to control the board and maintain pressure. The inclusion of card draw and mana fixing cards like Opt and Multiversal Passage ensures consistency and efficient gameplay. With a mix of aggressive creatures like Elusive Otter and versatile spells like Burst Lightning, this deck focuses on maintaining a fast-paced, aggressive playstyle.

The main concept of this Simic Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle using a combination of creatures and spells. With efficient mana ramp from cards like Llanowar Elves and Hushwood Verge, the deck aims to flood the board with powerful creatures like Brightglass Gearhulk and Craterhoof Behemoth. Gene Pollinator and Nature's Rhythm provide additional synergy and support for the aggressive strategy. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Quantum Riddler and Soul-Guide Lantern to control the game and maintain pressure on the opponent.
